revision_summary:
Two critical fabrications require targeted correction before this analysis is production-ready:

1. SPEAKER MISATTRIBUTION (critical — affects two sections): The quote 'I mean, I have time right now. I have time right now. I can talk to anyone right now.' at ~07:00 is spoken by speaker_0 (the REP), not the customer Nahida. Stage 3 builds an entire 'enthusiasm_signal' cherry_pick moment and a grounded_example in trajectory_verdict on this misattribution. Both must be rewritten. The corrected read: the rep verbally signals she has time right now, then immediately places the customer on hold — a rep self-contradiction moment. The customer's actual availability signal is at 06:52 ('Yeah. Yesterday. You can call me.') and is mild, not emphatic. Rewrite cherry_pick_moments[4] and trajectory_verdict.grounded_examples[1] accordingly.

2. KNOWLEDGE_GAP MISCLASSIFICATION (moderate — affects cherry_pick_moments[2] at 04:29): The moment is labeled 'knowledge_gap' but the rep is not lacking knowledge — she is correctly withholding closer-tier pricing content. The correct classification is scope-discipline failure (missing the universal_escape_hatch bridge). Update classification label and schema references to setter_scope_discipline.universal_escape_hatch and coaching_philosophy.curiosity_over_features.

3. MISSED MOMENTS requiring addition: (a) Personal phone number anti-pattern at 06:10 — schema's bill_collection.stewart_automated_bill_capture explicitly flags this detection signal and Stage 3 missed it entirely. (b) Recycled-lead context at 00:18 — the rep identifies a prior 2023 account but never checks for bill-on-file, which the schema flags as redundant time-burn on recycled leads. (c) Vulnerability disclosure handling at 02:12 — the doctor-call disclosure is noted in the handoff_brief but never evaluated against empathy_on_vulnerability_disclosure in cherry_pick_moments. (d) Positive rep behavior at 03:30 — rep uses satellite imagery to assess shade in real time; the uniformly critical analysis misses this as a positive signal.

4. MINOR TIMESTAMP FIX: rep_intent.evidence[0] cites 01:19 for the rep's program pitch, but at 01:19 the customer is still speaking. The rep's speech begins at ~01:25. Correct the timestamp.

5. TONE HEDGE: coaching_focus[0].why asserts a standing skill deficit ('until this rep can...') from a single call. Hedge to 'on this call, the rep did not...' per single-call evidence discipline.
